_note: frameWidth/frameHeight were derived from real sprite-sheet alpha-grid analysis, not guessed. The player grid (48x48, 4 cols) is confirmed and its animation indices are structurally valid. slime/skeleton frame SIZE is confirmed, but per-row animation semantics (which row is which action, how many frames each) could not be determined from pixels alone — those indices are placeholders set to 0 and flagged with _verify (per the organizer prompt's fallback rule).

player._grid: 192x192 = 4 cols x 4 rows (16 frames). 48px column/row spacing confirmed via alpha analysis.
player._verify: Row->direction order assumed down/left/right/up. Confirm visually that row 0 is walk-down, etc.

slime._grid: 224x416 = 7 cols x 13 rows (32px cells) detected via alpha analysis.
slime._verify: Animation layout NOT determinable from metadata. Open slime_sheet.png and set start/end/row mapping. Indices below are placeholders (0).

skeleton._grid: 288x624 = 6 cols x 13 rows (48px cells, from clean divisibility; sheet has no transparent gutters to confirm).
skeleton._verify: Animation layout NOT determinable from metadata. Open skeleton_sheet.png and set start/end/row mapping. Indices below are placeholders (0).
